jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Bikanervala
jsonLd.description:
Bikanervala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bikanervala:
Bikanervala is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
